cooked: the lightning spell empties your magic no matter what level or amount of magic you have? making a trainer for this is no harder than making one for any other game, just make a little program monitoring the data in the memory at the adress where the magic amount is stored and when it notices it changes, just reset it to full again, thats how most trainers works, why should it be impossible in lba2?
raw: the lightning spell empties your magic no matter what level or amount of magic you have..? making a trainer for this is no harder than making one for any other game, just make a little program monitoring the data in the memory at the adress where the magic amount is stored.. and when it notices it changes, just reset it to full again, that's how most trainers works, why should it be impossible in lba2?
